site.title: BIGO Biologics
hero.subtitle: Bigo Biologics builds the design infrastructure for that future.
vision.title: Operating System for Biology: From Protein Therapeutics to Biomaterials.
pillars.drug.title: Drug Discovery
pillars.drug.desc: Standard packages for high-affinity binder candidates and structural insights.
pillars.vaccine.title: Vaccine Display
pillars.vaccine.desc: PoC for antigen display design and multimeric nanocage conformations.
pillars.enzyme.title: Industrial Enzymes
pillars.enzyme.desc: PoC for optimized enzyme activity and structural materials for green manufacturing.
about.title: About Bigo Biologics
about.join-us: Bigo is seeking early discovery teams, healthcare investors, strategic partners, and validation collaborators.
team.zerong.name: Sun Zerong
team.zerong.bio: Biomedical Engineering, SUSTech. UC Berkeley visiting scholar. JHU PhD candidate (quit).
team.zhe.name: Li Zhe, Ph.D.
team.zhe.bio: Tenure Professor, SUSTech. Postdoc with David Baker. Lead of de novo structural design.
team.yuze.name: Sun Yuze, Ph.D.
team.yuze.bio: Oxford postdoc; Ph.D. in Mechanobiology, NUS. Expert in AI molecular design.
nav.bda.workflow.desc: Design automation pipeline and feedback engine
bda.hero.tagline: AI-driven protein design automation — from sequence to structure to function
bda.metric.cycle.label: R&D Cycle
bda.metric.cost.label: Lower R&D Cost
bda.metric.industrial.label: Industrialization Cycle
bda.drug.title: Drug Discovery
bda.drug.desc: High-affinity binder candidates, structural insights, expression/purification data. From target to lead in weeks.
bda.vaccine.title: Vaccine & Display
bda.vaccine.desc: Antigen display design, nanocage architecture, multimeric conformations. Accelerate vaccine development.
bda.enzyme.title: Industrial Enzymes
bda.enzyme.desc: De novo enzyme design with 100x efficiency. Ambient production for green manufacturing.
bda.workflow.title: BDA+ Workflow
bda.workflow.subtitle: Design · Build · Test · Learn · Scale
bda.workflow.step1.title: Structure Input
bda.workflow.step2.title: Backbone Generation
bda.workflow.step2.desc: Denoise to generate protein backbones (~1,500 candidates)
bda.workflow.step3.title: Sequence Design
bda.workflow.step4.title: Structure Validation
bda.workflow.step5.title: Interface Scoring
bda.workflow.step6.title: Partial Optimization
bda.workflow.step6.desc: Local resampling in lead backbone neighborhood
bda.feedback.title: Feedback Engine
bda.feedback.cycle: Design → Experiment → Data → Tokenizer → LLM → Better Design
bda.feedback.quote: Failed data is as valuable as successful data.
pipeline.coming_soon: Detailed data and results coming soon.
pipeline.bp326.title: BP 326
pipeline.bp326.desc: AI-designed PD-1 binder (~200 aa). Alternative to Keytruda/Pembrolizumab. 3-month design cycle.
pipeline.ribh.title: RibH
pipeline.ribh.desc: Nanocage vaccine display platform. Self-assembling protein cage architecture.
pipeline.cd3.title: CD3+
pipeline.cd3.desc: T-cell engager binding protein for immuno-oncology.
hook.question: What if designing a protein was as routine as designing a chip?
hook.subtext: EDA made semiconductors programmable. We're building the same infrastructure for biology.
sdg.hunger.label: SDG 2
sdg.hunger.title: Zero Hunger
sdg.hunger.desc: Protein nitrogen fixation replaces Haber-Bosch — sustainable agriculture without fossil-fuel-dependent fertilizers.
sdg.green.label: SDG 9 / 12
sdg.green.title: Green Manufacturing
sdg.green.desc: Low-carbon, low-toxicity catalysis. Enzymes that work at ambient temperature, replacing energy-intensive chemical processes.
sdg.medicine.label: SDG 3
sdg.medicine.title: Precision Medicine
sdg.medicine.desc: One patient, one drug. Computationally designed therapeutics tailored to individual biology.
platform.statement: Bigo BDA+ platform is our biomaterial development platform, allowing anyone to design and build with AI.
products.earlydrug.label: PD-1 / SARS-CoV-2 Spike
products.earlydrug.title: Early Drug Development
products.earlydrug.desc: AI-designed protein binders competing with billion-dollar antibody drugs — smaller, faster to produce, computationally optimized.
products.nanocage.label: Vaccine Nanocage Display
products.nanocage.title: Nano Robots
products.nanocage.desc: Programmable nanoparticle scaffolds for high-density antigen display — designed for stability, immunogenicity, and rapid iteration.
products.enzymes.label: Green Manufacturing Catalysts
products.enzymes.title: Industrial Enzymes
products.enzymes.desc: Engineered enzymes with 100x efficiency gains — ambient-temperature catalysis replacing energy-intensive chemical processes.

pipeline.overview.title: Platform Pipeline
pipeline.overview.hero_desc: Driving the next generation of biotherapeutics. The BIGO BDA platform accelerates discovery to deliver novel molecules with unprecedented speed and confidence.

pipeline.bp326.methodology.title: Methodology
pipeline.bp326.methodology.desc: Computational design, expression, purification, affinity validation, and data engineering integrated into a technical production workflow. Highly confident outputs achieved through rigorous wet-lab validation and generation scoring.
